patches.summary: WalkingPad BLE wire format (F7-framed commands, CRC, F8A2 status parsing) and the DeviceCodec/telemetry-snapshot implementation.
patches.reason: The reverse-engineered protocol is irreducible Tier-2 work the generator cannot derive from static BLE evidence.

patches.summary: Held-connection run/stop choreography (subscribe -> handshake -> manual -> settle -> start -> wait-for-running -> speed; stop ceremony) and local walk recording, on the novelCommands hook.
patches.reason: A one-shot write cannot sustain the belt; reliable control needs a sustained connection following the proven workflow spine, plus a history/profile store.

patches.summary: Hand-applied the shared version command (internal/cli/version.go + root.go registration) and the workflows-in-doctor block.
patches.reason: The original print predated the generator fix that emits the device version command and surfaces workflows in doctor; backfilled rather than reprinting to preserve the extensive Tier-2 hand-authoring.
